title: pterocarpus spanogheanus
intro: Pterocarpus spanogheanus, also known as the African Bloodwood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pterocarpus spanogheanus include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion, decoction, or ointment, and can also be used to make herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures.
